rationale: The citing paper explicitly analyzes paid-search effects and medium-specific cross-brand spillovers in a multibrand setting, while the cited paper is a core paid-search spillover study (generic-to-branded via awareness/carryover). Given this direct construct overlap (paid search + spillover dynamics), the citation could plausibly be a mechanism/foundational comparison rather than a purely incidental mention, so it merits second-stage judgment.
